economic_notes: Tulita Developments Ltd is a 100% subsidiary with forestry services and commercial rentals. Investment in Two Rivers Development Group Ltd (20% interest, 234 Class A voting shares). Investment in Tulita District Investment Company ($5,000). COVID-19 noted as having little impact on the organization.
notes: Consolidated statements include Tulita Developments Ltd (100% subsidiary). Two Rivers Development Group Ltd held at cost ($117,000) as modified equity method information not available. GST receivable of $73,888 represents previous years amounts CRA has not refunded. Due to Related Parties of $205,879 to Tulita Financial Corporation is non-interest bearing with no fixed repayment terms, classified as long-term. Auditor name not visible in provided documents. Revenue figures in revenue_lines combine both Band (Statement II) and subsidiary (Statement 11A); consolidated total revenue is $1,124,915 per Statement II plus subsidiary revenues partially eliminated on consolidation. Management fees of $31,000 paid by Tulita Development to executive staff of the Band.
